---
title: "City of Milwaukie Oregon Solid Waste Rates Review"
year: 2025
image: /images/milwaukie-or.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Milwaukie, Oregon"
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# 2025
You can see Chris Bell, CPA presenting his report on solid waste rate review
for the city of Milwaukie, Oregon at the city commission meeting.

{{<video https://www.youtube.com/embed/Q_3Iy2O7F9M?si=BPod_8fAN31kjQ6S&amp;start=4139>}}

:::
